---
title: "Pokemon Battle"
---

```{=html}
<div id="game">
  <div id="enemy-area">
    <p id="enemy-name">Charmander</p>
    <p id="enemy-hp">HP: 100</p>
  </div>
  <div id="player-area">
    <p id="player-name">Bulbasaur</p>
    <p id="player-hp">HP: 100</p>
  </div>
  <div id="battle-log">Battle started!</div>
  <button onclick="attack()">⚔️ Attack</button>
  <button onclick="heal()">💊 Heal</button>
</div>

<script>
let playerHP = 100;
let enemyHP = 100;

function attack() {
  if (playerHP <= 0 || enemyHP <= 0) return;
  let playerDmg = Math.floor(Math.random() * 20) + 5;
  let enemyDmg = Math.floor(Math.random() * 15) + 5;
  enemyHP = Math.max(0, enemyHP - playerDmg);
  playerHP = Math.max(0, playerHP - enemyDmg);
  update(`You dealt ${playerDmg} damage! Enemy dealt ${enemyDmg} damage!`);
}

function heal() {
  if (playerHP <= 0) return;
  let amount = Math.floor(Math.random() * 20) + 10;
  playerHP = Math.min(100, playerHP + amount);
  let enemyDmg = Math.floor(Math.random() * 15) + 5;
  playerHP = Math.max(0, playerHP - enemyDmg);
  update(`You healed ${amount} HP! Enemy dealt ${enemyDmg} damage!`);
}

function update(msg) {
  document.getElementById("player-hp").textContent = `HP: ${playerHP}`;
  document.getElementById("enemy-hp").textContent = `HP: ${enemyHP}`;
  let log = playerHP <= 0 ? "You fainted! 💀" : enemyHP <= 0 ? "Enemy fainted! 🎉 You win!" : msg;
  document.getElementById("battle-log").textContent = log;
}
</script>
```
